basic_details.job_title: SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Speech Therapist, Senior Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research (SVNIRTAR)
basic_details.post_name: Speech Therapist, Senior Stenographer, Radiographer Grade-I, Laboratory Technician Grade-I
basic_details.short_information: Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research (SVNIRTAR) Speech Therapist, Senior Stenographer, Radiographer Grade-I, and Laboratory Technician Grade-I Notification 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. AD 6B 10/04/2026 on the official website of SVNIRTAR. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen/Departmental candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors degree in Speech Pathology and Audiology, Matriculation or equivalent with shorthand and typing speed, +2 Science with Diploma in Medical Radiation Technology and experience, Matriculation with Laboratory Technician Course and experience
qualification.details: Speech Therapist: Bachelors degree in Speech Pathology and Audiology. (Desirable: 02 years experience) Senior Stenographer: Matriculation or equivalent; 120 Words per minute in shorthand and 50 words per minute in type writing. Radiographer Grade-I: +2 Science with Biology or Mathematics; Diploma in Medical Radiation Technology (DMRT) or Diploma in Radiography; 5 Years experience as Radiographer. (Desirable: Degree in DMRT) Laboratory Technician Grade-I: Matriculation; Laboratory Technician Course; 5 Years experience as Laboratory Technician.

salary_details.details: Speech Therapist: Pay Matrix Level-6 (Rs.35,400 – 1,12,400/-) Senior Stenographer: Pay Matrix Level-6 (Rs.35,400 – 1,12,400/-) Radiographer Grade-I: Pay Matrix Level-6 (Rs.35,400 – 1,12,400/-) Laboratory Technician Grade-I: Pay Matrix Level-5 (Rs.29,200 – 92,300/-)

selection_process: Written Test (Objective/Multiple Choice Questions) Desirable Qualification Desirable Experience
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SVNIRTAR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications for the SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 is 20th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are for the posts of Speech Therapist, Senior Stenographer, Radiographer Grade-I, and Laboratory Technician Grade-I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Speech Therapist post?
faq.answer: For the Speech Therapist post, candidates must possess a Bachelors degree in Speech Pathology and Audiology. Two years of experience in the relevant field is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the posts advertised by SVNIRTAR?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts advertised by SVNIRTAR is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1000/-. SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, and PwBD candidates are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 will primarily involve a Written Test consisting of Objective/Multiple Choice Questions. Desirable qualifications and experience may also be considered.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Laboratory Technician Grade-I post?
faq.answer: The Laboratory Technician Grade-I post offers a salary in Pay Matrix Level-5, which ranges from Rs. 29,200 to Rs. 92,300 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, applications for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 must be submitted strictly through the online mode. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for SVNIRTAR Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of SVNIRTAR?
faq.answer: Swami Vivekanand National Institute of Rehabilitation Training and Research (SVNIRTAR) is located in Cuttack, Odisha, with the pincode 754010.
